configurations.name: api-server
runtimeArgs: set -a; source .env; set +a; export PORT=8080; npx pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev

configurations.name: lifehub
runtimeArgs: set -a; source .env; set +a; export PORT=5173; export BASE_PATH=/; npx pnpm --filter @workspace/lifehub run dev

configurations.name: mockup-sandbox
runtimeArgs: set -a; source .env; set +a; export PORT=5174; export BASE_PATH=/; npx pnpm --filter @workspace/mockup-sandbox run dev
